chunks.title: Hezekiah Sends Envoys to Isaiah
chunks.reason: Describes Hezekiah's reaction and the messengers' dialogue with Isaiah.

chunks.title: Rabshakeh's Second Message to Hezekiah
chunks.reason: Contains the Assyrian general's taunt and rhetorical questions sent to Hezekiah.

chunks.title: Hezekiah's Prayer of Faith
chunks.reason: Depicts Hezekiah spreading the letter before God and praying for deliverance.

chunks.title: Isaiah's Prophecy Against Assyria
chunks.reason: Records the Lord's specific judgment and promise of defense against Sennacherib.

chunks.title: The Fall of the Assyrian Army and King
chunks.reason: Narrates the angelic strike on the camp and the subsequent death of Sennacherib.
